# femtech-radar

> Agent-first FemTech intelligence: a live three-unit pipeline (MCP server → weekly GitHub Agentic
> Workflow → Astro + RSS site) that fetches, dedupes, and scores women's-health & FemTech research and
> industry news into a curated, subscribable weekly digest, built on GitHub-native primitives.

This file follows the [llms.txt](https://llmstxt.org/) convention: a concise, machine-readable map
of the project for large language models and AI agents.

## About

- Repository: https://github.com/ChanMeng666/femtech-radar (public)
- Live site: https://chanmeng666.github.io/femtech-radar/
- RSS feed: https://chanmeng666.github.io/femtech-radar/rss.xml
- npm package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@chanmeng666/femtech-radar-mcp (v0.1.0)
- Primary stack: TypeScript (strict, ESM) · Node.js ≥ 20 · pnpm monorepo · Astro 5 · MCP
- License: MIT

## Architecture (three units, all live)

1. MCP server (`packages/mcp-server/`, published as `@chanmeng666/femtech-radar-mcp`) — deterministic
   fetch → normalize → dedupe → score; tools `radar_collect` / `radar_sources`.
2. Weekly workflow (`.github/workflows/weekly-radar.md`, `gh aw`, engine copilot) — Copilot curates a
   digest and commits `data/YYYY-Www.json` via a review-gated PR + a summary issue.
3. Astro + RSS site (`site/`, `femtech-radar-site`) — reads `data/*.json`, auto-deploys to GitHub Pages.

## Key documents

- [README](https://github.com/ChanMeng666/femtech-radar/blob/master/README.md): overview, features, installation, the live site
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/ChanMeng666/femtech-radar/blob/master/AGENTS.md): how AI agents should work in this repo — full architecture, commands, gotchas
- [Design spec](https://github.com/ChanMeng666/femtech-radar/tree/master/docs/superpowers/specs): the approved three-unit design
- [Implementation plans](https://github.com/ChanMeng666/femtech-radar/tree/master/docs/superpowers/plans): per-unit task-level plans
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/ChanMeng666/femtech-radar/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md): development setup and contribution workflow
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/ChanMeng666/femtech-radar/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md): version history

## For agents

Read README and AGENTS.md first, then the design spec for depth. Prefer the project's own scripts over
ad-hoc commands. Critical gotchas: in `site/`, import the data contract from the side-effect-free
subpath `@chanmeng666/femtech-radar-mcp/schema` (never the package root — it boots the stdio server),
and preserve the agent-added `why_it_matters` field (the base `WeeklyDataSchema` is non-strict and
strips it). Module resolution differs by package: `.js` suffixes are required in `packages/mcp-server`,
extensionless imports in `site/`. Keep the repo public (free Actions + Pages).
